title: Binged to Death
overview: When an obsessive single woman and her best friend learn that their favorite reality show couples have broken up, they abduct them and subject them to a series of cruel games, all with the hopes of rekindling their favorite TV romances.

trailers.title: BINGED TO DEATH | Stars Loni Love, Carl Anthony Payne II, Quincy Brown | Premieres On MTV Oct. 17
